note: Evidence-COMPLETENESS rules. These describe how complete the women-specific evidence is, NOT whether the medicine is good, safe, or effective. Editable by Mantis/Bumble without touching UI code.

female_representation.note: pct of trial population that is female. >=adequate is 'adequately represented'; between under- and adequate is 'underrepresented'; below under- is 'severely underrepresented'.

tiers.label: Strong evidence coverage
tiers.description: Multiple strong sources with relevant sex-specific efficacy AND safety analysis.

tiers.label: Moderate evidence coverage
tiers.description: Women adequately represented but meaningful sex-specific or hormone-relevant analysis is incomplete.

tiers.label: Limited evidence coverage
tiers.description: Women represented but underrepresented, subgroup analysis is limited, or important context is missing.

tiers.label: Insufficient evidence coverage
tiers.description: Relevant women-specific evidence exists only through observational, label, post-market, retrospective, or similarly limited sources.

tiers.label: No relevant women-specific evidence found
tiers.description: No relevant women-specific evidence found in the explicitly reviewed source set.
